details.test: Task 1: Request residential screw piling quote for 2-storey extension
Task 2: Pile quantity and cost estimate for warehouse under 60000 and quote request
Task 3: Book cheapest piling rig with rating >=4 under 1000 per day for 3 days
Task 4: Shortlist 3 Melbourne basement excavation projects completed 2020–2023
Task 5: Locate ISO 45001 certification and submit safety compliance enquiry referencing it
Task 6: Find typical 10-lot subdivision earthworks duration and request morning callback
Task 7: Schedule site inspection for retaining wall piling at nearest branch to 2000 on 15th next month
Task 8: Configure earthworks package under 40 hours and 20000 budget and request quote
